disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No difficulty breathing, no noisy/stridulous breathing, no difficulty swallowing saliva, no drooling
trigger_question_examples: Any trouble breathing, or noisy/whistling breathing?
Can you swallow your own saliva, or are you drooling?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — I can breathe fine, no noisy breathing, and I can swallow my saliva okay.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No high fever/rigors, not systemically toxic, not sitting forward to breathe
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel you have to sit up and lean forward to breathe comfortably?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No high fevers, and I can lie back fine — I don't have to sit forward.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Preceding coryzal viral prodrome (rhinorrhoea, fatigue) 72h ago
trigger_question_examples: Did this start with a cold — runny nose, tiredness?
Can you tell me a bit more about that?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, it started with a runny nose and feeling tired a few days ago.
